Headline: Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running with significant delays following an earlier police activity near Pulaski. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running with significant delays following an earlier police activity near Pulaski. 

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
